plugins.name: project-initializer
plugins.description: Scaffold a new project's living agent documentation — AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and docs/* — with maintenance conventions baked in.

plugins.name: to-prd
plugins.description: Turn the current conversation into a feature-level PRD and publish it to the issue tracker, or fall back to docs/prds/. Reads project-initializer living docs.

plugins.name: azure-devops-card
plugins.description: Draft Azure DevOps work-item titles and markdown descriptions in Brazilian Portuguese, in the [categoria][FRONTEND|BACKEND] title pattern.

plugins.name: skill-auditor
plugins.description: Audit and improve your Claude skills against Claude Code best practices — frontmatter, triggering, leanness, progressive disclosure.

plugins.name: tsconfig-upgrade
plugins.description: Safely upgrade tsconfig.json — pre-flight breaking changes, preserve paths/aliases, and handle cascading TS errors (TS2729, TS5090).

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: 41 cross-referencing marketing skills — SEO, AI search (AEO/GEO), CRO, analytics, schema, copywriting, ads, email, social, PR, pricing, and more. Derived from coreyhaines31/marketingskills (see NOTICE).
